'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 108''' is the one hundred eighth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[January 21]], [[2004]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Victory on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]
*Princess [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]
*[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]
*[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]
*[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Viqi Shesh]]
*[[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] - Landscape
*[[SCM-22 stenographer]] droid
*Technology of [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]]
*[[Pulsar Skate]]
